scripts.build:nginx: npm run build && npm run deploy:nginx
scripts.build:nginx:lab: VITE_ENABLE_TRADE_LAB=true npm run build && npm run deploy:nginx
scripts.build:android:debug: npm run build:android:web && npm run build:android:native && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && bash scripts/check-16kb-alignment.sh app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk
scripts.build:android:release: npm run build:android:web && npm run build:android:native && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && bash scripts/check-16kb-alignment.sh app/build/outputs/apk/release/*.apk
scripts.build:desktop:linux: npm run build:desktop:prepare && node desktop/scripts/package.mjs linux
scripts.build:desktop:windows: npm run build:desktop:prepare && node desktop/scripts/package.mjs windows
scripts.build:desktop:macos: npm run build:desktop:prepare && node desktop/scripts/package.mjs macos
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build:desktop:prepare && tauri dev --config desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json --no-dev-server
scripts.check:desktop: npm run build:desktop:prepare && cargo test --locked --manifest-path desktop/arti-sidecar/Cargo.toml && cargo test --locked --manifest-path desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && npm run check:typography
